description: Performance harness originally asserted the 50ms / 5ms advisory bounds with hard expect().toBeLessThan() despite verification-architecture.md pinning them as advisory-in-CI soft bounds. The harness now logs the measured median, emits console.warn on advisory-bound exceedance, and only hard-fails on a 5x catastrophic regression bound (250ms / 25ms).

evidence.snippet: Pre-fix: expect(median).toBeLessThan(50). Post-fix: console.log(median); if (median > advisory) console.warn(...); expect(median).toBeLessThan(advisory * 5).

resolution.notes: Three-part advisory pattern matches the soft-bound methodology in verification-architecture.md.
